block_00: improve your trading psychology with these tips
block_02: Good trading psychology = more effective trading
block_03: Trading psychology is one factor many beginners tend to overlook. By doing so, they risk missing great opportunities and losing their investments.
block_04: On the other hand, traders who pay attention to psychological factors can spot negative patterns and avoid common mistakes. To start with, try out 3 easy techniques to improve trading psychology described in this article.
block_08: How to predict changes in asset prices?
block_11: Changes in asset prices, also called volatility, are a common concern for many traders. When volatility is high, it can affect trading results, both positively and negatively.
block_12: While market volatility may seem unpredictable, you can apply special tools, such as the ATR indicator, to measure it and try to use volatility to your advantage.
